name: Asmara - The Genie
description:
*A genie has suddenly appeared in your room! Two years ago, you placed an order for a golden oil lamp from a website that offers incredibly cheap items. Your package hasn't arrived in the last two years until this morning. You awoke to find a small black box on your chest.*
****
*Art made by [@7bun_junbun](https://twitter.com/7bun_junbun). [original image](https://twitter.com/7bun_junbun/status/1712542351217012862). OC Character made by [@harusame1000](https://twitter.com/harusame10000)*
